2603.24254.title: Embracing Heteroscedasticity for Probabilistic Time Series Forecasting
2603.24254.paper_summary: Probabilistic time series forecasting (PTSF) aims to model the full predictive distribution of future observations, enabling both accurate forecasting and principled uncertainty quantification. A central requirement of PTSF is to embrace heteroscedasticity, as real-world time series exhibit time-varying conditional variances induced by nonstationary dynamics, regime changes, and evolving external conditions. However, most existing non-autoregressive generative approaches to PTSF, such as TimeVAE and $K^2$VAE, rely on MSE-based training objectives that implicitly impose a homoscedastic assumption, thereby fundamentally limiting their ability to model temporal heteroscedasticity. To address this limitation, we propose the Location-Scale Gaussian VAE (LSG-VAE), a simple but effective framework that explicitly parameterizes both the predictive mean and time-dependent variance through a location-scale likelihood formulation. This design enables LSG-VAE to faithfully capture heteroscedastic aleatoric uncertainty and introduces an adaptive attenuation mechanism that automatically down-weights highly volatile observations during training, leading to improved robustness in trend prediction. Extensive experiments on nine benchmark datasets demonstrate that LSG-VAE consistently outperforms fifteen strong generative baselines while maintaining high computational efficiency suitable for real-time deployment.
2603.24254.paper_summary_zh: 概率時間序列預測 (PTSF) 旨在建模未來觀測值的完整預測分佈，從而實現準確的預測和原則性的不確定性量化。PTSF 的一個核心要求是接受異方差性，因為現實世界的時間序列顯示出由非平穩動態、制度變化和演變的外部條件引起的時間變化條件方差。然而，大多數現有的非自回歸生成方法，如 TimeVAE 和 $K^2$VAE，依賴於基於均方誤差 (MSE) 的訓練目標，這隱含地強加了同方差的假設，從而根本限制了它們建模時間異方差性的能力。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了位置-尺度高斯變分自編碼器 (LSG-VAE)，這是一個簡單但有效的框架，通過位置-尺度似然公式明確參數化預測均值和時間依賴的方差。這一設計使 LSG-VAE 能夠真實地捕捉異方差的隨機不確定性，並引入了一種自適應衰減機制，在訓練過程中自動降低高度波動觀測值的權重，從而提高趨勢預測的穩健性。在九個基準數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，LSG-VAE 始終超越十五個強大的生成基準，同時保持適合實時部署的高計算效率。
2603.24254.author: Yijun Wang et.al.
2603.24254.authors: Yijun Wang, Qiyuan Zhuang, Xiu-Shen Wei
